provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Prohibited Imports (Tanzania) (Fireworks) Order.

The importation into Tanzania of any firework other than a distress or signal rocket is hereby prohibited except where the person importing the firework has previously obtained the written permission of the Inspector-General of Police.
